segments.text: WOMAN: Good morning. How can I help you?
segments.translation: 女：早上好。有什么可以帮您？

segments.text: MAN: Hello. I'm interested in renting a house somewhere in the town.
segments.translation: 男：你好。我想在城里租间房。

segments.text: WOMAN: Right. Could I have your name please?
segments.translation: 女：好的。请问您叫什么名字？

segments.text: MAN: Yes, it's Steven Godfrey.
segments.translation: 男：我叫史蒂夫·戈弗雷。

segments.text: WOMAN: And tell me how many bedrooms you're looking for.
segments.translation: 女：您想租几间卧室的呢？

segments.text: MAN: Well, we'd need four, because I'm going to share the house with three friends.
segments.translation: 男：我们需要四间卧室，因为我打算和我三个朋友合租。

segments.text: WOMAN: Okay, there are several of that size on our books.
segments.translation: 女：好的，我们这里有一些这样的房源。

segments.text: They mostly belong to families who are working abroad at the moment. What about the location?
segments.translation: 户主基本都是在国外工作的。地点有什么要求吗？

segments.text: MAN: It'd be nice to be central.
segments.translation: 男：在市中心最好了。

segments.text: WOMAN: That might be difficult, as most houses of that size are in the suburbs.
segments.translation: 女：这可能有点困难，这么大的房子基本都在郊区。

segments.text: Still, there are a few.
segments.translation: 但我们还是有一些这样的房子。

segments.text: What's your upper limit for the rent?
segments.translation: 你们的租房预算上限是多少？

segments.text: MAN: We'd like something around £500 a month, but we could go up to £600 if we have to.
segments.translation: 男：我们希望月租在500英镑左右，但看情况也可以到600。

segments.text: But we can't go beyond that.
segments.translation: 不能超过这个数了。

segments.text: WOMAN: Do you know how long you want to rent the house for?
segments.translation: 女：你打算租多长时间呢？

segments.text: The minimum let is six months, as you probably realise.
segments.translation: 我们这儿最少租期是6个月，这个您应该了解。

segments.text: MAN: We're at college here for two years, and we don't want to have to move during that time if we can avoid it.
segments.translation: 男：我们要在这儿上两年大学，而且不到迫不得已我们也不想搬来搬去的。

segments.text: WOMAN: Right. And how soon do you want to move in?
segments.translation: 女：好的。你们想多快住进去呢？

segments.text: All our lets start on the first of the month.
segments.translation: 我们这儿都是每个月第一天开始算租期的。

segments.text: MAN: Well, as soon as possible, really, so that means September 1st.
segments.translation: 男：当然越快越好了。所以那就是9月1号了。

segments.text: WOMAN: Okay, let me have a look at what we've got ....
segments.translation: 女：好的，我来看看我们这儿有什么……

segments.text: We have photographs of all the houses on our books, so you can get an idea of what they're like.
segments.translation: 我们的册子上有房子的照片，你可以看看它们的样子。

segments.text: There's this one in Oakington Avenue, at £550 a month.
segments.translation: 在奥金顿大道上有一栋房子，月租是550英镑。

segments.text: Combined living room and dining room, with a separate kitchen.
segments.translation: 包括客厅饭厅，有单独的厨房。

segments.text: It doesn't have a garage, though you can park in the road.
segments.translation: 不带车库，不过路边就可以停车。

segments.text: MAN: Ah, we'd prefer to have one, if possible.
segments.translation: 男：呃，最好是有车库的。

segments.text: WOMAN: Right. Then have a look at this house, in Mead Street.
segments.translation: 女：好的。那看看这栋房子吧，在米德大街上。

segments.text: It's got a very large living room and kitchen, bathroom, cloakroom ...
segments.translation: 客厅很大，有厨房、浴室、衣帽间……

segments.text: MAN: How much is it?
segments.translation: 男：这个多少钱？

segments.text: WOMAN: That one's 580. It's very well furnished and equipped.
segments.translation: 女：这个是580。这套是精装修的，设施也齐全。

segments.text: It also has plenty of space for parking, and it's available for a minimum of a year.
segments.translation: 这里也有足够的空间停车。这套房至少可以租一年。

segments.text: Oh, and there's a big garden.
segments.translation: 对了，它还带一个大花园。

segments.text: MAN: I don't think we could cope with that, to be honest.
segments.translation: 男：老实说，这个我们估计应付不了。

segments.text: We'll be too busy to look after it.
segments.translation: 我们都很忙，没时间照看花园。

segments.text: WOMAN: Okay. Then there's this older house in Hamilton Road: living room, kitchen-diner, and it has a study.550 a month.
segments.translation: 女：好的。在汉密尔顿路上有一套旧一点的，有客厅，厨房和餐厅在一起，然后有一个书房。月租550。

segments.text: MAN: That looks rather nice. But whereabouts in Hamilton Road?
segments.translation: 男：这套看上去还行。是在汉密尔顿路什么位置啊？

segments.text: WOMAN: Towards the western end.
segments.translation: 女：在西头。

segments.text: MAN: Oh, that'll be very noisy. I know the area.
segments.translation: 男：哦，那边好吵啊。我知道那块儿。

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, it's pretty lively. Some people like it, though.
segments.translation: 女：是的，很有生活气息。有些人就喜欢这样的。

segments.text: Well, what about this house in Devon Close?
segments.translation: 好吧，这套德文巷的房子怎么样？

segments.text: MAN: That looks lovely.
segments.translation: 男：看上去不错啊。

segments.text: WOMAN: There's a big demand for houses in that area, so prices tend to be quite high.
segments.translation: 女：那一带租房的人多，所以租金会偏高一些。

segments.text: But this one hasn't been decorated for a few years, which has kept the rent down a bit.
segments.translation: 但这套房好几年没有翻修了，所以租金会低一些。

segments.text: It's got a living room, dining room and small kitchen, and it's 595 a month.
segments.translation: 房子里有客厅、饭厅和一个小厨房，月租是595.

segments.text: I think it would suit you, from what you've said.
segments.translation: 我觉得这套挺适合你的。

segments.text: MAN: It sounds fine.
segments.translation: 男：听上去不错。

segments.text: MAN: Why's that part of town so popular?
segments.translation: 男：这一片为什么这么抢手呀？

segments.text: WOMAN : Well, there's a big scheme to improve the district, and it'll soon have the best facilities for miles around.
segments.translation: 女：那一片要进行大规模的改造，不久之后那边就会配备方圆数英里内最好的设施了。

segments.text: MAN: What sort of thing?
segments.translation: 男：都有些什么呀？

segments.text: WOMAN: There's a big sports centre under construction, which will be very impressive when it's finished.
segments.translation: 女：那边正在建一个大型体育中心，建成后会非常壮观。

segments.text: In fact the swimming pool's already opened, ahead of schedule, and it's attracting a lot of people.
segments.translation: 实际上游泳馆已经提前开放了，好多人都往那儿去。

segments.text: MAN: What about cinemas: are there any in the area?
segments.translation: 男：那电影院呢？那附近有吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: The only one closed down last year, and it's now in the process of being converted into a film museum.
segments.translation: 女：唯一的一个电影院去年关门了，那里现在正在被改建成一个电影博物馆。

segments.text: The local people are trying to get a new cinema added to the scheme.
segments.translation: 当地居民正在争取将建造新电影院列入改造工程。

segments.text: MAN: I think I heard something about a plan to replace the existing concert hall with a larger one.
segments.translation: 男：我好像听说会建一个更大的音乐厅来取代现在的这个。

segments.text: WOMAN: Ah, that's due to start next year.
segments.translation: 女：啊，这个项目明年就要启动了。

segments.text: MAN: Well it sounds an interesting area to live in.
segments.translation: 男：这块地方听起来还挺不错的。

segments.text: Could I go and see the house, please?
segments.translation: 我能去看看房子吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, of course.
segments.translation: 女：当然可以。
